hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command' | grep -E '^git (commit|push)' > /dev/null && npm run check > /dev/null 2>&1 && echo '{"continue": true}' || echo '{"continue": false, "stopReason": "Safety check failed: npm run build or npm run test:e2e failed. Fix errors before committing."}' || true

jq -r '.tool_input.command' | grep -E '^git push' > /dev/null && npm run check > /dev/null 2>&1 && echo '{"continue": true}' || echo '{"continue": false, "stopReason": "Safety check failed: npm run build or npm run test:e2e failed. Fix errors before pushing."}' || true
